channel.title: Is there a sample page set up to show how the content within the flexible content is being returned?
channel.description:
Hi, new to Frontity as well as React.
Is there a sample page set up to show how the content within the flexible content is being returned?
Using your example code, say the Who We Are content block has a Description and an Image within it, how does that get returned?

item.title: Is there a sample page set up to show how the content within the flexible content is being returned?
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
HI @deadsushi,

Welcome to the Community!

I recommend you to follow our Step by Step Tutorial so you can get a better understanding on how to create a custom Frontity project

Hope this helps

Read full topic
item.source: Is there a sample page set up to show how the content within the flexible content is being returned?
